[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-8)

A single JSON object is returned:

```
{
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "created_at": "2023-12-18T19:52:07.071755Z",
  "response": "",
  "done": true
}
```

#### Unload a model

[Permalink: Unload a model](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#unload-a-model)

If an empty prompt is provided and the `keep_alive` parameter is set to `0`, a model will be unloaded from memory.

##### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-10)

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/generate -d '{
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "keep_alive": 0
}'
```

##### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-9)

A single JSON object is returned:

```
{
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "created_at": "2024-09-12T03:54:03.516566Z",
  "response": "",
  "done": true,
  "done_reason": "unload"
}
```

## Generate a chat completion

[Permalink: Generate a chat completion](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#generate-a-chat-completion)

```
POST /api/chat
```

Generate the next message in a chat with a provided model. This is a streaming endpoint, so there will be a series of responses. Streaming can be disabled using `"stream": false`. The final response object will include statistics and additional data from the request.

### Parameters

[Permalink: Parameters](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#parameters-1)

- `model`: (required) the [model name](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#model-names)
- `messages`: the messages of the chat, this can be used to keep a chat memory
- `tools`: list of tools in JSON for the model to use if supported
- `think`: (for thinking models) should the model think before responding?

The `message` object has the following fields:

- `role`: the role of the message, either `system`, `user`, `assistant`, or `tool`
- `content`: the content of the message
- `thinking`: (for thinking models) the model's thinking process
- `images` (optional): a list of images to include in the message (for multimodal models such as `llava`)
- `tool_calls` (optional): a list of tools in JSON that the model wants to use
- `tool_name` (optional): add the name of the tool that was executed to inform the model of the result

Advanced parameters (optional):

- `format`: the format to return a response in. Format can be `json` or a JSON schema.
- `options`: additional model parameters listed in the documentation for the [Modelfile](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/modelfile.mdx#valid-parameters-and-values) such as `temperature`
- `stream`: if `false` the response will be returned as a single response object, rather than a stream of objects
- `keep_alive`: controls how long the model will stay loaded into memory following the request (default: `5m`)

### Tool calling

[Permalink: Tool calling](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#tool-calling)

Tool calling is supported by providing a list of tools in the `tools` parameter. The model will generate a response that includes a list of tool calls. See the [Chat request (Streaming with tools)](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#chat-request-streaming-with-tools) example below.

Models can also explain the result of the tool call in the response. See the [Chat request (With history, with tools)](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#chat-request-with-history-with-tools) example below.

[See models with tool calling capabilities](https://ollama.com/search?c=tool).

### Structured outputs

[Permalink: Structured outputs](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#structured-outputs-1)

Structured outputs are supported by providing a JSON schema in the `format` parameter. The model will generate a response that matches the schema. See the [Chat request (Structured outputs)](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#chat-request-structured-outputs) example below.

### Examples

[Permalink: Examples](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#examples-1)

#### Chat request (Streaming)

[Permalink: Chat request (Streaming)](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#chat-request-streaming)

##### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-11)

Send a chat message with a streaming response.

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/chat -d '{
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "messages": [\
    {\
      "role": "user",\
      "content": "why is the sky blue?"\
    }\
  ]
}'
```

##### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-10)

A stream of JSON objects is returned:

```
{
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "created_at": "2023-08-04T08:52:19.385406455-07:00",
  "message": {
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The",
    "images": null
  },
  "done": false
}
```

Final response:

```
{
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "created_at": "2023-08-04T19:22:45.499127Z",
  "message": {
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": ""
  },
  "done": true,
  "total_duration": 4883583458,
  "load_duration": 1334875,
  "prompt_eval_count": 26,
  "prompt_eval_duration": 342546000,
  "eval_count": 282,
  "eval_duration": 4535599000
}
```

#### Chat request (Streaming with tools)

[Permalink: Chat request (Streaming with tools)](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#chat-request-streaming-with-tools)

##### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-12)

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/chat -d '{
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "messages": [\
    {\
      "role": "user",\
      "content": "what is the weather in tokyo?"\
    }\
  ],
  "tools": [\
    {\
      "type": "function",\
      "function": {\
        "name": "get_weather",\
        "description": "Get the weather in a given city",\
        "parameters": {\
          "type": "object",\
          "properties": {\
            "city": {\
              "type": "string",\
              "description": "The city to get the weather for"\
            }\
          },\
          "required": ["city"]\
        }\
      }\
    }\
  ],
  "stream": true
}'
```

##### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-11)

A stream of JSON objects is returned:

```
{
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "created_at": "2025-07-07T20:22:19.184789Z",
  "message": {
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "",
    "tool_calls": [\
      {\
        "function": {\
          "name": "get_weather",\
          "arguments": {\
            "city": "Tokyo"\
          }\
        }\
      }\
    ]
  },
  "done": false
}
```

Final response:

```
{
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "created_at": "2025-07-07T20:22:19.19314Z",
  "message": {
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": ""
  },
  "done_reason": "stop",
  "done": true,
  "total_duration": 182242375,
  "load_duration": 41295167,
  "prompt_eval_count": 169,
  "prompt_eval_duration": 24573166,
  "eval_count": 15,
  "eval_duration": 115959084
}
```

[Permalink: Chat request (With History)](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#chat-request-with-history)

      "content": "why is the sky blue?"\

      "role": "assistant",\
      "content": "due to rayleigh scattering."\
    },\
    {\

      "content": "how is that different than mie scattering?"\
    }\
  ]
}'

  "message": {
    "role": "assistant",
    "content": "The"
  },
  "done": false
}
```

Final response:

```
{
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "created_at": "2023-08-04T19:22:45.499127Z",

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/chat -d '{
  "model": "llama3.2",
  "messages": [\
    {\
      "role": "user",\
      "content": "what is the weather in Toronto?"\
    },\
    // the message from the model appended to history\
    {\
      "role": "assistant",\
      "content": "",\
      "tool_calls": [\
        {\
          "function": {\
            "name": "get_weather",\
            "arguments": {\
              "city": "Toronto"\
            }\
          }\
        }\
      ]\
    },\
    // the tool call result appended to history\
    {\
      "role": "tool",\
      "content": "11 degrees celsius",\
      "tool_name": "get_weather"\
    }\
  ],
  "stream": false,
  "tools": [\
    {\
      "type": "function",\
      "function": {\
        "name": "get_weather",\
        "description": "Get the weather in a given city",\
        "parameters": {\
          "type": "object",\
          "properties": {\
            "city": {\
              "type": "string",\
              "description": "The city to get the weather for"\
            }\
          },\
          "required": ["city"]\
        }\
      }\
    }\
  ]
}'
```

## Create a Model

[Permalink: Create a Model](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#create-a-model)

```
POST /api/create
```

Create a model from:

- another model;
- a safetensors directory; or
- a GGUF file.

If you are creating a model from a safetensors directory or from a GGUF file, you must [create a blob](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#create-a-blob) for each of the files and then use the file name and SHA256 digest associated with each blob in the `files` field.

### Parameters

[Permalink: Parameters](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#parameters-2)

- `model`: name of the model to create
- `from`: (optional) name of an existing model to create the new model from
- `files`: (optional) a dictionary of file names to SHA256 digests of blobs to create the model from
- `adapters`: (optional) a dictionary of file names to SHA256 digests of blobs for LORA adapters
- `template`: (optional) the prompt template for the model
- `license`: (optional) a string or list of strings containing the license or licenses for the model
- `system`: (optional) a string containing the system prompt for the model
- `parameters`: (optional) a dictionary of parameters for the model (see [Modelfile](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/modelfile.mdx#valid-parameters-and-values) for a list of parameters)
- `messages`: (optional) a list of message objects used to create a conversation
- `stream`: (optional) if `false` the response will be returned as a single response object, rather than a stream of objects
- `quantize` (optional): quantize a non-quantized (e.g. float16) model

#### Quantization types

[Permalink: Quantization types](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#quantization-types)

| Type | Recommended |
| --- | :-: |
| q4\_K\_M | \* |
| q4\_K\_S |  |
| q8\_0 | \* |

### Examples

[Permalink: Examples](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#examples-2)

#### Create a new model

[Permalink: Create a new model](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#create-a-new-model)

Create a new model from an existing model.

##### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-23)

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/create -d '{
  "model": "mario",
  "from": "llama3.2",
  "system": "You are Mario from Super Mario Bros."
}'
```

##### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-22)

A stream of JSON objects is returned:

{"status":"using already created layer sha256:8c17c2ebb0ea011be9981cc3922db8ca8fa61e828c5d3f44cb6ae342bf80460b"}
{"status":"using already created layer sha256:7c23fb36d80141c4ab8cdbb61ee4790102ebd2bf7aeff414453177d4f2110e5d"}
{"status":"using already created layer sha256:2e0493f67d0c8c9c68a8aeacdf6a38a2151cb3c4c1d42accf296e19810527988"}
{"status":"using already created layer sha256:2759286baa875dc22de5394b4a925701b1896a7e3f8e53275c36f75a877a82c9"}
{"status":"writing layer sha256:df30045fe90f0d750db82a058109cecd6d4de9c90a3d75b19c09e5f64580bb42"}

#### Quantize a model

[Permalink: Quantize a model](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#quantize-a-model)

Quantize a non-quantized model.

##### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-24)

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/create -d '{
  "model": "llama3.2:quantized",
  "from": "llama3.2:3b-instruct-fp16",
  "quantize": "q4_K_M"
}'

#### Create a model from GGUF

[Permalink: Create a model from GGUF](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#create-a-model-from-gguf)

Create a model from a GGUF file. The `files` parameter should be filled out with the file name and SHA256 digest of the GGUF file you wish to use. Use [/api/blobs/:digest](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#push-a-blob) to push the GGUF file to the server before calling this API.

##### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-25)

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/create -d '{
  "model": "my-gguf-model",
  "files": {
    "test.gguf": "sha256:432f310a77f4650a88d0fd59ecdd7cebed8d684bafea53cbff0473542964f0c3"
  }
}'
```

##### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-24)

A stream of JSON objects is returned:

```
{"status":"parsing GGUF"}
{"status":"using existing layer sha256:432f310a77f4650a88d0fd59ecdd7cebed8d684bafea53cbff0473542964f0c3"}
{"status":"writing manifest"}
{"status":"success"}
```

#### Create a model from a Safetensors directory

[Permalink: Create a model from a Safetensors directory](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#create-a-model-from-a-safetensors-directory)

The `files` parameter should include a dictionary of files for the safetensors model which includes the file names and SHA256 digest of each file. Use [/api/blobs/:digest](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#push-a-blob) to first push each of the files to the server before calling this API. Files will remain in the cache until the Ollama server is restarted.

##### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-26)

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/create -d '{
  "model": "fred",
  "files": {
    "config.json": "sha256:dd3443e529fb2290423a0c65c2d633e67b419d273f170259e27297219828e389",
    "generation_config.json": "sha256:88effbb63300dbbc7390143fbbdd9d9fa50587b37e8bfd16c8c90d4970a74a36",
    "special_tokens_map.json": "sha256:b7455f0e8f00539108837bfa586c4fbf424e31f8717819a6798be74bef813d05",

    "tokenizer_config.json": "sha256:24e8a6dc2547164b7002e3125f10b415105644fcf02bf9ad8b674c87b1eaaed6",
    "model.safetensors": "sha256:1ff795ff6a07e6a68085d206fb84417da2f083f68391c2843cd2b8ac6df8538f"
  }
}'
```

##### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-25)

A stream of JSON objects is returned:

```
{"status":"converting model"}
{"status":"creating new layer sha256:05ca5b813af4a53d2c2922933936e398958855c44ee534858fcfd830940618b6"}

## Check if a Blob Exists

[Permalink: Check if a Blob Exists](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#check-if-a-blob-exists)

```
HEAD /api/blobs/:digest
```

Ensures that the file blob (Binary Large Object) used with create a model exists on the server. This checks your Ollama server and not ollama.com.

### Query Parameters

[Permalink: Query Parameters](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#query-parameters)

- `digest`: the SHA256 digest of the blob

### Examples

[Permalink: Examples](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#examples-3)

#### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-27)

```
curl -I http://localhost:11434/api/blobs/sha256:29fdb92e57cf0827ded04ae6461b5931d01fa595843f55d36f5b275a52087dd2
```

#### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-26)

Return 200 OK if the blob exists, 404 Not Found if it does not.

## Push a Blob

[Permalink: Push a Blob](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#push-a-blob)

```
POST /api/blobs/:digest
```

Push a file to the Ollama server to create a "blob" (Binary Large Object).

### Query Parameters

[Permalink: Query Parameters](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#query-parameters-1)

- `digest`: the expected SHA256 digest of the file

### Examples

[Permalink: Examples](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#examples-4)

#### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-28)

```
curl -T model.gguf -X POST http://localhost:11434/api/blobs/sha256:29fdb92e57cf0827ded04ae6461b5931d01fa595843f55d36f5b275a52087dd2
```

#### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-27)

Return 201 Created if the blob was successfully created, 400 Bad Request if the digest used is not expected.

## Show Model Information

    "llama.vocab_size": 128256,
    "tokenizer.ggml.bos_token_id": 128000,
    "tokenizer.ggml.eos_token_id": 128009,
    "tokenizer.ggml.merges": [], // populates if `verbose=true`
    "tokenizer.ggml.model": "gpt2",
    "tokenizer.ggml.pre": "llama-bpe",
    "tokenizer.ggml.token_type": [], // populates if `verbose=true`
    "tokenizer.ggml.tokens": [], // populates if `verbose=true`
  },
  capabilities: ["completion", "vision"],
}
```

## Copy a Model

[Permalink: Copy a Model](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#copy-a-model)

```
POST /api/copy
```

Copy a model. Creates a model with another name from an existing model.

### Examples

[Permalink: Examples](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#examples-7)

#### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-31)

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/copy -d '{
  "source": "llama3.2",
  "destination": "llama3-backup"
}'
```

#### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-30)

Returns a 200 OK if successful, or a 404 Not Found if the source model doesn't exist.

## Delete a Model

[Permalink: Delete a Model](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#delete-a-model)

```
DELETE /api/delete
```

Delete a model and its data.

### Parameters

[Permalink: Parameters](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#parameters-4)

- `model`: model name to delete

### Examples

[Permalink: Examples](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#examples-8)

#### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-32)

```
curl -X DELETE http://localhost:11434/api/delete -d '{
  "model": "llama3:13b"
}'
```

#### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-31)

Returns a 200 OK if successful, 404 Not Found if the model to be deleted doesn't exist.

## Pull a Model

[Permalink: Pull a Model](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#pull-a-model)

```
POST /api/pull
```

Download a model from the ollama library. Cancelled pulls are resumed from where they left off, and multiple calls will share the same download progress.

### Parameters

[Permalink: Parameters](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#parameters-5)

- `model`: name of the model to pull
- `insecure`: (optional) allow insecure connections to the library. Only use this if you are pulling from your own library during development.
- `stream`: (optional) if `false` the response will be returned as a single response object, rather than a stream of objects

### Examples

[Permalink: Examples](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#examples-9)

#### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-33)

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/pull -d '{
  "model": "llama3.2"
}'
```

#### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-32)

If `stream` is not specified, or set to `true`, a stream of JSON objects is returned:

The first object is the manifest:

```
{
  "status": "pulling manifest"
}
```

Then there is a series of downloading responses. Until any of the download is completed, the `completed` key may not be included. The number of files to be downloaded depends on the number of layers specified in the manifest.

```
{
  "status": "pulling digestname",
  "digest": "digestname",
  "total": 2142590208,
  "completed": 241970
}
```

After all the files are downloaded, the final responses are:

```
{
    "status": "verifying sha256 digest"
}
{
    "status": "writing manifest"
}
{
    "status": "removing any unused layers"
}
{
    "status": "success"
}
```

if `stream` is set to false, then the response is a single JSON object:

```
{
  "status": "success"
}
```

## Push a Model

[Permalink: Push a Model](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#push-a-model)

```
POST /api/push
```

Upload a model to a model library. Requires registering for ollama.ai and adding a public key first.

### Parameters

[Permalink: Parameters](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#parameters-6)

- `model`: name of the model to push in the form of `<namespace>/<model>:<tag>`
- `insecure`: (optional) allow insecure connections to the library. Only use this if you are pushing to your library during development.
- `stream`: (optional) if `false` the response will be returned as a single response object, rather than a stream of objects

### Examples

[Permalink: Examples](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#examples-10)

#### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-34)

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/push -d '{
  "model": "mattw/pygmalion:latest"
}'
```

#### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-33)

If `stream` is not specified, or set to `true`, a stream of JSON objects is returned:

```
{ "status": "retrieving manifest" }
```

and then:

```
{
  "status": "starting upload",
  "digest": "sha256:bc07c81de745696fdf5afca05e065818a8149fb0c77266fb584d9b2cba3711ab",
  "total": 1928429856
}
```

Then there is a series of uploading responses:

```
{
  "status": "starting upload",
  "digest": "sha256:bc07c81de745696fdf5afca05e065818a8149fb0c77266fb584d9b2cba3711ab",
  "total": 1928429856
}
```

Finally, when the upload is complete:

```
{"status":"pushing manifest"}
{"status":"success"}
```

If `stream` is set to `false`, then the response is a single JSON object:

```
{ "status": "success" }
```

## Generate Embeddings

[Permalink: Generate Embeddings](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#generate-embeddings)

```
POST /api/embed
```

Generate embeddings from a model

### Parameters

[Permalink: Parameters](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#parameters-7)

- `model`: name of model to generate embeddings from
- `input`: text or list of text to generate embeddings for

Advanced parameters:

- `truncate`: truncates the end of each input to fit within context length. Returns error if `false` and context length is exceeded. Defaults to `true`
- `options`: additional model parameters listed in the documentation for the [Modelfile](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/modelfile.mdx#valid-parameters-and-values) such as `temperature`
- `keep_alive`: controls how long the model will stay loaded into memory following the request (default: `5m`)
- `dimensions`: number of dimensions for the embedding

### Examples

[Permalink: Examples](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#examples-11)

#### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-35)

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/embed -d '{
  "model": "all-minilm",
  "input": "Why is the sky blue?"
}'
```

#### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-34)

```
{
  "model": "all-minilm",
  "embeddings": [\
    [\
      0.010071029, -0.0017594862, 0.05007221, 0.04692972, 0.054916814,\
      0.008599704, 0.105441414, -0.025878139, 0.12958129, 0.031952348\
    ]\
  ],
  "total_duration": 14143917,
  "load_duration": 1019500,
  "prompt_eval_count": 8
}
```

#### Request (Multiple input)

[Permalink: Request (Multiple input)](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-multiple-input)

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/embed -d '{
  "model": "all-minilm",
  "input": ["Why is the sky blue?", "Why is the grass green?"]
}'
```

#### Response

[Permalink: Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-35)

```
{
  "model": "all-minilm",
  "embeddings": [\
    [\
      0.010071029, -0.0017594862, 0.05007221, 0.04692972, 0.054916814,\
      0.008599704, 0.105441414, -0.025878139, 0.12958129, 0.031952348\
    ],\
    [\
      -0.0098027075, 0.06042469, 0.025257962, -0.006364387, 0.07272725,\
      0.017194884, 0.09032035, -0.051705178, 0.09951512, 0.09072481\
    ]\
  ]
}
```

## Experimental Features

[Permalink: Experimental Features](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#experimental-features)

### Image Generation (Experimental)

[Permalink: Image Generation (Experimental)](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#image-generation-experimental)

Warning

Image generation is experimental and may change in future versions.

Image generation is now supported through the standard `/api/generate` endpoint when using image generation models. The API automatically detects when an image generation model is being used.

See the [Generate a completion](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#generate-a-completion) section for the full API documentation. The experimental image generation parameters (`width`, `height`, `steps`) are documented there.

#### Example

[Permalink: Example](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#example)

##### Request

[Permalink: Request](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#request-39)

```
curl http://localhost:11434/api/generate -d '{
  "model": "x/z-image-turbo",
  "prompt": "a sunset over mountains",
  "width": 1024,
  "height": 768
}'
```

##### Response (streaming)

[Permalink: Response (streaming)](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#response-streaming)

Progress updates during generation:

```
{
  "model": "x/z-image-turbo",
  "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:30:00.000000Z",
  "completed": 5,
  "total": 20,
  "done": false
}
```

##### Final Response

[Permalink: Final Response](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/api.md#final-response)

```
{
  "model": "x/z-image-turbo",
  "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:30:15.000000Z",
  "image": "iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUg...",
  "done": true,
  "done_reason": "stop",
  "total_duration": 15000000000,
  "load_duration": 2000000000
}
```

You can’t perform that action at this time.
